mnemonics.title: Top 10 Order
mnemonics.content: BAC-SIC-SS-CI-VM-LC-API: Broken Access Control, Cryptographic Failures, Injection, Insecure Design, Security Misconfig, Vulnerable Components, Identity Failures, Logging, API Security

visualTips.visualization: Picture a security checkpoint scanning all incoming packages
Imagine unique secret handshake for each transaction

analogies.analogy: Like a bouncer checking IDs at club entrance
Sending letters in locked briefcases with matching keys
